title: uxplaintext
html:
uxplaintext

Add to My Topics
Add selected topic and subtopicsAdd Topic & Subtopics with topic headAdd entire publication

Download PDF
Save selected topicSave selected topic and subtopicsSave entire publication

Email LinkCopy Link
Feedback
  • Last UpdatedSept 12, 2025
    • Uniface
    • 10.4

The uxplaintext widget is a read-only control that displays field values only. The field is explicitly set to non-editable and cannot be modified by the user.

Default Logical Widgets

The default logical widget is ux-PlainText.

Triggers

There is no trigger mapping for the ux-PlainText widget.

Keyboard support

There is no keyboard support for the widget.

Layout processing

Widget class method processLayout() constructs the template HTML for this widget. It generates nodes for the control itself as well as slots for prefix, suffix, control, and error icon, and returns it to Uniface. Use this function to enhance the widget with more static features.

Widget properties

The uxplaintext widget supports the following properties:

Table 1. Widget Properties
Property Description
html:title Defines a hover over text or tooltip, currently used as helper text.
html:hidden Defines a boolean value that hides or shows the plaintext.
html:slot Defines the slot at which the element belongs to.
class:classname Boolean value that adds or removes a specified class.
label-text Defines a translatable label text.
plaintext-format Defines how the field values are formatted. The supported formatting options are:
  • first-line: Shows only the first line of the field value in case of multiple lines.
  • single-line: Shows all lines in a single line.
  • multi-line: Shows all lines separated by </br>.
  • multi-paragraphs: Shows all lines as paragraphs <p>line</p>.
  • valrep-text: Shows the representation and value using format:`Representation (Value)`
  • valrep-html: Shows the representation and value using html:`<span class="u-valrep-rep">Representation</span><span class="u-valrep-value">Value</span>`, where CSS can be used to style.
  • representation-only: Shows the representation of the value as plain text.
  • value-only: Shows only the value part of the valrep.
prefix-icon1) Defines the name of the icon displayed before the input control.
prefix-text Defines the text displayed before the input control. Ignored if prefix-icon is specified.
suffix-icon1) Defines the name of the icon displayed after the input control.
suffix-text Defines the text displayed after the input control. Ignored if suffix-icon is specified.
exclude Defines that there will be no column for the field in the uxdatagrid.
Note: This is actually not a widget property. It is a field property, used by the uxdatagrid widget if that is the containing entity's widget.
1) - Icons are provided by Fluent UI Icons. Note that, if an invalid icon name is defined, no icon nor an error indication is displayed.

Helper and validation error visualization

A uxplaintext deals with the following error visualizations:

  • Alert icon (after suffix icon)
  • Tool-tip when hovering the "Alert icon" showing the error message

UI blocking

No UI-blocking is required for theuxplaintext widget.

Widget styling

CSS Selector Selected node(s)
.u-plain-text Widget node
.u-plain-text .u-label-text Label text node
.u-plain-text.u-invalid Widget node when the value is invalid
.u-plain-text .u-control Control node
.u-plain-text .u-prefix Prefix icon or text node
.u-plain-text .u-suffix Suffix icon or text node
.u-plain-text .u-paragraph Paragraph text node
.u-plain-text .u-valrep-rep Valrep representation node
.u-plain-text .u-valrep-value Valrep value node
.u-plain-text .u-valrep-error Valrep error node
.u-plain-text .u-error-icon Error icon node

Widget sources

The widget source files, such as JavaScript and CSS files, can be downloaded from the following GitHub repository: https://github.com/RocketSoftware/uniface-ux/tree/main/src/ux/plain_text.

Related Links
  • ux-PlainText

    This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-PlainText properties.

  • UX Widgets

    Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder.
